RAVE5E.Editor.AttributeKeyHint: For dnd5e keys and examples, see the 5e wiki.
RAVE5E.Editor.Title: RAVE Conditional Editor
RAVE5E.Editor.Compare.Hint: The value to compare against. Use JSON for booleans, numbers, arrays, and objects.
RAVE5E.Editor.Compare.Label: Compare
RAVE5E.Editor.Condition.Label: Condition
RAVE5E.Editor.GeneratedJSON.Hint: The saved condition data generated from the fields above.
RAVE5E.Editor.GeneratedJSON.Label: Generated JSON
RAVE5E.Editor.GeneratedJSON.ObjectWarnin: Generated JSON must be a JSON object.
RAVE5E.Editor.Match.Label: Match
RAVE5E.Editor.Not.Label: Not
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.AddHint: Add this value to the current value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.DowngradeHint: Use this value only if it is lower than the current value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.Hint: What to do when the condition passes.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.Label: Operation
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.MultiplyHint: Multiply the current value by this value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.OverrideHint: Replace the current value with this value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.SubtractHint: Subtract this value from the current value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.ToggleHint: Add or remove this value from a Set or array, or flip a boolean field.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operation.UpgradeHint: Use this value only if it is higher than the current value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.EqualsHint: Passes when the path value exactly equals the compare value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.ExistsHint: Passes when the path is present or missing, based on Compare.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.GreaterThanEqualH: Passes when the path value is numerically greater than or equal to the compare value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.GreaterThanHint: Passes when the path value is numerically greater than the compare value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.Hint: How the path value is tested.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.InHint: Passes when the path value is present in the compare array.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.IncludesHint: Passes when the path array includes the compare value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.Label: Operator
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.LessThanEqualHint: Passes when the path value is numerically less than or equal to the compare value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.LessThanHint: Passes when the path value is numerically less than the compare value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.NotEqualsHint: Passes when the path value does not exactly equal the compare value.
RAVE5E.Editor.Operator.TruthyHint: Passes when the path exists and its value is truthy.
RAVE5E.Editor.Path.Hint: Actor roll-data path to check. Autocomplete entries marked (*) are exposed by the Rave 5e module.
RAVE5E.Editor.Path.Label: Path
RAVE5E.Editor.Value.Hint: The value used by the operation.
RAVE5E.Editor.Value.Label: Value
RAVE5E.Editor.When.Label: When
